entries.title: Controlled documents index.
entries.notes: Capture with at least one active document and one draft or archived document so status badges and publication counts are visible.
entries.useCase: An administrator reviews controlled documents and sees which policy or legal records have published versions.

entries.title: Controlled document edit form.
entries.notes: Requires a seeded Document record. The key field is disabled; title, status, metadata, and relation manager tabs should be visible.
entries.useCase: An administrator updates the title, lifecycle status, or metadata for a controlled document.

entries.title: Document publications relation manager.
entries.notes: Requires at least one DocumentPublication, ideally one created from a Publishing Studio revision so published_revision_id is populated.
entries.useCase: A compliance reviewer checks immutable publication versions, hashes, revision IDs, and publish timestamps for a document.

entries.title: Document acceptances relation manager.
entries.notes: Requires seeded DocumentAcceptance rows linked to the controlled document. Include at least one context such as registration or account_update.
entries.useCase: A compliance reviewer confirms which version a user or workflow accepted and when that acceptance was recorded.
